rows.profile_edit_sub: Name, date of birth, year group

haptics.label: Haptic feedback
haptics.sub: Gentle vibrations on right/wrong and when advancing.

session_length.title: Default practice length
session_length.sub: How many questions per practice session by default?

photo_retention.title: Keep photos for
photo_retention.sub: How long we keep the original before it's automatically deleted.
photo_retention.cap_note: Privacy: original photos are deleted after 7 days at the latest.

data_saver.label: Data saver
data_saver.sub: Don't fetch preview images for study sessions over the network.

dyslexia_font.label: OpenDyslexic font
dyslexia_font.sub: Easier-to-read font for dyslexia (font ships in the next update).

export.title: Data export
export.body: We'll pack everything into a ZIP: account, profile, questions, attempts, subscription status. Sent by email, valid for 7 days.
export.requested_body: You'll receive a link by email as soon as the data is ready (up to 24h).

delete.title: Delete account
delete.body: 7-day grace period: you can cancel the deletion during this time. After that, everything is permanently removed.
delete.confirm_body: You have 7 days to undo this. After that, all data is permanently deleted.
delete.requested_body: We'll send a confirmation by email. You can undo it within 7 days. Your subscription will be cancelled at the end of the current billing period.

about.title: About LearnBuddy
about.privacy_body: All study data stays in the EU. No ads, no sharing with third parties for training purposes.

archived.title: Archive
archived.banner: Archived items can be restored for 30 days. After that they are permanently deleted.

profile_edit.title: Profile
profile_edit.birth_date_hint: Date of birth {{date}} (can only be changed via a data request)
profile_edit.birth_date_immutable: Date of birth can only be changed via a data request.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.daily_sub: At {{time}}. Only on days without a session.
notifications.test_sub: 3 days / 1 day / morning before tests in scheduled folders.
notifications.streak_sub: A gentle nudge when the learning streak is about to break.
notifications.permission_body: To remind you about tests and practice sessions, please allow notifications.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.trial_body: You're on the 14-day trial. Full access until it ends.

plus.title: Plus
plus.feature_1: More than double the material captures

subscription.offerings_error: Couldn't load plans. Please try again.
subscription.restore_success_body: Your subscription status has been updated.
